summary: Comprehensive testing completed for BioLumina Life Sciences marketing agency website. Backend APIs working correctly with 90.9% success rate. Frontend fully functional with real content loading properly. All major features tested successfully including navigation, case studies, team members, blog posts, and contact form submission.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 400 'Email already subscribed' on duplicate subscription

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Team members API - 6 members loaded
Case studies API - 6 case studies loaded
Blog posts API - 6 blog posts loaded
Client logos API - 6 company names loaded
Contact form submission working
Newsletter subscription (with duplicate prevention)
Error handling for non-existent resources (404s)
Homepage hero section with real scientist images
Services section with 4 service cards displaying correctly
Case studies preview section loading 3 case studies on homepage
Client logos section showing all 6 styled company names
About page team section loading 6 team members with professional photos
Case studies page with filtering and modal functionality
Blog page with posts loading and search functionality
Contact form submission with success confirmation
All navigation links working correctly
Mobile responsive design verified
Real Unsplash images used throughout site
No JavaScript console errors
No network request failures
success_percentage: Backend: 90.9% (10/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all major functionality working)
